overview: This auction is conducted by MSTC on behalf of 3 SIG BN CRPF for the disposal of electrical & electronics govt/regimental stores items, general non electrical items, mt spare parts & mt store items and other materials located at West Bengal.
scopeOfWork: Lifting, clearing, and disposal of designated lots of electrical & electronics govt/regimental stores items, general non electrical items, mt spare parts & mt store items and other materials in accordance with MSTC Special Terms & Conditions (STC). All items are sold on an "As-Is-Where-Is" basis.

eligibility: Valid MSTC Buyer Registration in active status.
GSTIN Registration Certificate matching the buyer profile.
Hazardous waste/smelter authorization from State Pollution Control Board (SPCB) is mandatory.
CPCB/SPCB E-Waste recycler registration required for e-waste lots.

depositDetails.preBidDdg: Not required for registered MSME bidders
